necessityProof.blockerResolved: After v2130, fake-shell, fake-harness, execution-denied, final-prerequisite, and human-approval upstream reports still repeated the same title/meta/section markdown frame while only a few local evidence rows differed.
necessityProof.laterConsumer: N1 final acceptance and N5 Phase-B merge planning can now classify these runtime-prerequisite reports as builder-backed instead of treating them as custom markdown surfaces.
necessityProof.reuseDecision: The shared verification report builder owns the common report frame. Requirement/no-go row strings, final closure bracketed message rows, and Java/mini-kv evidence file plus expected-snippet sections remain local because their exact line grammar is specific to the report family.
necessityProof.growthStopCondition: No helper was added. A future helper is allowed only when three or more remaining renderers share the same local evidence row grammar and a temporary legacy comparison proves byte-identical output.

focusedRendererBatch.command: npx vitest run test/verificationReportBuilder.test.ts test/governanceGrowthRatchet.test.ts and 6 fake-shell/fake-harness/final-prerequisite/human-approval renderer tests --testTimeout=180000

byteIdenticalCompare.method: Temporary Vitest test loaded legacy renderer source from git HEAD, rewired imports to current source modules, loaded real profiles, and asserted equality with each migrated renderer output.

archiveDeliverables: 代码讲解记录_生产雏形阶段3/r2000/2102-renderer-consolidation-batch-14-v2131.md

crossProjectParallel.reason: v2131 only changes Node markdown rendering for existing reports and consumes frozen historical evidence through existing loaders; it does not request fresh sibling evidence, live integration, upstream service startup, or schema changes.
